label: task_profile_research_evidence_iterative.json
description: Research evidence profile — separates source discovery, claim verification, and final synthesis with persistent audit artifacts.

iterations.title: Research Evidence: Core Fact Discovery
iterations.prompt:
Research evidence workflow is enabled.

Overall goal:
Collect strong source-backed facts for the target topic.

Current focus area:
Core Fact Discovery

Area guidance:
Check: (1) gather a compact but diverse source set, (2) extract concrete claims with source linkage, (3) record freshness and reliability, (4) identify open gaps early.

Execution rules:
- Keep scope limited to this focus area.
- Searcher: gather evidence and update artifacts.
- Verifier: assess source support and claim quality.
- Finalizer: synthesize only verified claims.
- Organize work around the persistent evidence pack and claim ledger.

iterations.title: Research Evidence: Conflict Resolution and Verification
iterations.prompt:
Research evidence workflow is enabled.

Overall goal:
Resolve conflicting claims and raise confidence before synthesis.

Current focus area:
Conflict Resolution and Verification

Area guidance:
Check: (1) conflicting claims are explicitly compared, (2) weak sources are downgraded or rejected, (3) every important claim has a current status, (4) unsupported claims are not allowed into the final output.

Execution rules:
- Keep scope limited to this focus area.
- Searcher may perform targeted follow-up evidence gathering only when verifier requests it.
- Verifier decides verdict and claim statuses.
- Finalizer may only run after acceptance.

iterations.title: Research Evidence: Final Synthesis
iterations.prompt:
Research evidence workflow is enabled.

Overall goal:
Produce a concise final answer that uses only verified claims and clearly labels uncertainty.

Current focus area:
Final Synthesis

Area guidance:
Check: (1) all material statements map to verified claims, (2) caveats and unresolved gaps are visible, (3) source notes are preserved, (4) no rejected or unverified claims leak into the final answer.

Execution rules:
- Keep scope limited to this focus area.
- Searcher should not add broad new evidence here.
- Verifier should confirm the ledger is ready.
- Finalizer should write the user-facing synthesis and optional report.
- Organize the output into the standard finalizer sections.
